title: hieracium graecum subsp. cyllenium
intro: Hieracium graecum subsp. cyllenium, also known as Greek hawkweed, is a perennial plant belonging to the dandelion family (Asteraceae). This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Greek hawkweed include its potential to treat various ailments such as digestive issues, skin conditions, and respiratory problems, as well as its ability to boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, Greek hawkweed can be found in teas, infusions, and tinctures, often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
